subject: ASSIGN read-only support: WS1.4 JSON-LD review prep
body:
Coordinator assignment from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

Fiery Igniting Furnace is actively implementing WS1.4 JSON-LD in graph-core under a fresh claim. Take a non-overlapping read-only support job: prepare the review and acceptance lens for WS1.4 while Fiery codes.

Scope: no edits, no git/index activity, no claim unless you discover an edit is required and ask first. Inspect relevant existing graph-core APIs, package/export surface, JSON-LD plan context, and likely acceptance checks. Do not review Fiery WIP as final until Fiery signals product+tests ready.

Reply to Luminous and Fiery with a concise READINESS/COMMENTS note: expected risk areas, tests/gates to expect, and anything Fiery should watch before commit. Keep this supportive, not blocking, unless you find a clear correctness issue.
